diagnoses.name: Atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary artery
diagnoses.evidence_span: with documented atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary arteries

diagnoses.name: Old myocardial infarction
diagnoses.evidence_span: prior myocardial infarction, and status post angioplasty with stent placement

diagnoses.name: Presence of coronary angioplasty implant and graft
diagnoses.evidence_span: the presence of a coronary angioplasty implant and graft

diagnoses.name: Paroxysmal atrial fibrillation
diagnoses.evidence_span: paroxysmal atrial fibrillation requiring anticoagulation consideration

diagnoses.name: Presence of cardiac pacemaker
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient has a pacemaker in place for rhythm management. A permanent pacemaker was implanted for conduction abnormalities.

diagnoses.name: Chronic lymphocytic leukemia of B-cell type not having achieved remission
diagnoses.evidence_span: the patient carries multiple significant diagnoses. He has chronic lymphocytic leukemia of B-cell type without remission

diagnoses.name: Type 2 diabetes mellitus
diagnoses.evidence_span: type 2 diabetes mellitus requiring insulin therapy

diagnoses.name: Personal history of transient ischemic attack and cerebral infarction without residual deficits
diagnoses.evidence_span: His neurological history includes a prior transient ischemic attack and cerebral infarction without residual deficits

diagnoses.name: Anxiety disorder, unspecified
diagnoses.evidence_span: His anxiety disorder, unspecified, has complicated symptom interpretation in the past. The patient's anxiety was monitored throughout the admission.

procedures.name: Serial cardiac workup
procedures.evidence_span: During admission, the patient underwent serial cardiac workup.

medications.name: Aspirin
medications.evidence_span: Aspirin 325 mg PO as needed for chest discomfort

medications.name: Insulin
medications.evidence_span: Insulin SC per home regimen (56 units as previously prescribed)

medications.name: Nitroglycerin
medications.evidence_span: Nitroglycerin SL PRN for chest pain
